cases.passage: XYZ Corporation, a multinational company, has its presence in over 15 countries. To manage its vast operations, the company has decided to implement a computerised accounting system. The system will enable the accounting team to track cash flows, manage inventory, and generate financial reports with ease. The system will also help in automating tasks such as reconciliations, journal entries, and billing. The company has shortlisted three vendors - ABC Software Solutions, DEF Technologies, and GHI Systems - to provide the required software. The accounting team will conduct a thorough feasibility study to select the most suitable system. What are the key features of a computerised accounting system as mentioned in the passage?

questions.q: What is the main objective of implementing a computerised accounting system in XYZ Corporation?
opts: To automate tasks such as reconciliations, journal entries, and billing
To increase the speed of financial reporting
To reduce the complexity of financial reporting
questions.explanation: The passage mentions that the system will enable the accounting team to generate financial reports with ease, indicating an increase in the speed of financial reporting.

questions.q: Which of the following tasks will be automated by the computerised accounting system?
questions.explanation: The passage mentions that the system will automate tasks such as reconciliations, journal entries, and billing.

questions.q: What is the purpose of conducting a feasibility study by the accounting team?
opts: To evaluate the technical capabilities of the software
To assess the financial viability of the system
To select the most suitable system from the shortlisted vendors
To test the software before implementation
questions.explanation: The passage mentions that the accounting team will conduct a thorough feasibility study to select the most suitable system, indicating that the purpose is to select the most suitable system.

questions.q: Which of the following is a key benefit of using a computerised accounting system?
questions.explanation: The passage mentions that the system will enable the accounting team to track cash flows and manage inventory with ease, indicating enhanced data accuracy.

questions.q: Who are the three vendors shortlisted by XYZ Corporation to provide the required software?
opts: ABC Software Solutions, DEF Technologies, and GHI Systems
JKL Software Solutions, MNO Technologies, and PQR Systems
RST Software Solutions, UVW Technologies, and XYZ Systems
questions.explanation: The passage explicitly mentions that the company has shortlisted three vendors - ABC Software Solutions, DEF Technologies, and GHI Systems.

cases.passage: A small business owner, Rohan, is struggling to manage his inventory and accounts due to the increasing number of customers and suppliers. He has decided to implement a computerised accounting system to streamline his operations. Rohan has chosen a cloud-based accounting software that can be accessed from anywhere, at any time. The software will enable him to track inventory levels, generate invoices, and manage cash flows in real-time. Rohan is excited to take his business to the next level with the help of this system. What are the key benefits of using a cloud-based accounting software?

questions.q: What is the primary advantage of using a cloud-based accounting software?
questions.explanation: The passage mentions that the software can be accessed from anywhere, at any time, indicating increased accessibility.

questions.q: Which of the following tasks will be facilitated by the cloud-based accounting software?
questions.explanation: The passage mentions that the software will enable Rohan to generate invoices, indicating that invoicing and billing will be facilitated.

questions.q: What is the main objective of Rohan in implementing a computerised accounting system?
opts: To increase the speed of financial reporting
questions.explanation: The passage mentions that Rohan is struggling to manage his inventory and accounts, indicating that the main objective is to streamline his operations.

questions.q: Which of the following is a key benefit of using a cloud-based accounting software?
questions.explanation: The passage mentions that the software will enable Rohan to track inventory levels, generate invoices, and manage cash flows in real-time, indicating improved data accuracy.

questions.q: How will Rohan be able to access the cloud-based accounting software?
questions.explanation: The passage explicitly mentions that the software can be accessed from anywhere, at any time.
